nasb.text: We have heard of the pride of Moab—he is very proud— Of his haughtiness, his pride, his arrogance and his self-exaltation.

esv.text: We have heard of the pride of Moab— he is very proud— of his loftiness, his pride, and his arrogance, and the haughtiness of his heart.

cnv.text: 我們聽說摩押的驕傲， 它非常驕傲； 我們聽到它的狂妄、驕傲、傲慢和心裡的自高。

ccb.text: 我们听说摩押人傲气冲天， 他们狂妄自大、心中高傲。
